notes: Solid asteroids implementation with working split mechanics, wrap-around, invulnerability, and waves, but asteroid split radii are too small (20/10px vs expected 20/10 is fine but visual sizing feels off), thrust flame draws even when ship is dead, and bullet limit of 5 feels restrictive.
A solid but not polished Asteroids clone with recognizable visuals and basic mechanics, held back by inconsistent time-step handling, limited firing behavior, and some gameplay rough edges.
